figures.caption: Figure 1.1: Ten trajectories of a Brownian motion.

Figure 1.2: Ten trajectories of a homogeneous Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (Definition 1.6) starting from Y0 = 2 with λ = 5 and σ = 1/2, all stopped at time T = 5 (left). Histogram of YT on N = 5000 draws compared to the limiting normal (right).

Figure 1.3: Exemplifying Proposition 1.7 with histograms of Ornstein-Uhlenbeck processes stopped at T = 1 starting from Y0 with mixture distribution p⋆ = 0.8N (−1,1/2) + 0.2N (−2,1/2). Diffusion parameters are as in Figure 1.2. Histograms are computed over N = 50000 trajectories.
Figure 2.1: Conditional vector fields and their marginal averages for continuous and jumpprocess interpolants.
